form.label: Hardware End of Life Summary
form.description: Version 2: Promoted base searches to hidden panel queries, no pricing

search.query: `cisco_oi_index("$cpyKey$")` sourcetype::cisco:bcs:devicegroup | mvexpand groupName | dedup groupName | table groupName | sort groupName

condition.set: [| tstats values(deviceId) as deviceId WHERE ( `cisco_oi_index($cpyKey$)` sourcetype::cisco:bcs:devicegroupmember groupName="$groupIdSelected$")]
search [| tstats values(deviceId) as deviceId WHERE ( `cisco_oi_index($cpyKey$)` sourcetype::cisco:bcs:devicegroupmember groupName="$groupIdSelected$")]

search.query: ((`cisco_oi_index("$cpyKey$")` sourcetype=cisco:bcs:asset (physicalAssetType=$typeSelector$)) OR (`cisco_oi_index("$cpyKey$")` sourcetype=cisco:bcs:hardwareendoflife (physicalAssetType=$typeSelector$))) deviceId IN (*) | stats values(deviceName) as deviceName values(hardwareEndOfLifeId) as hardwareEndOfLifeId values(productFamily) as productFamily values(currentEndOfLifeMilestone) as currentEndOfLifeMilestone by deviceId physicalAssetId productId | dedup physicalAssetId | fillnull value=0 hardwareEndOfLifeId | fillnull value="Not Announced" currentEndOfLifeMilestone | $singleLineGroupSelector$ | eval currentEndOfLifeMilestone = if(like(currentEndOfLifeMilestone, "EoRFA%"), "EoRFA", currentEndOfLifeMilestone) | eval currentEndOfLifeMilestone = if(like(currentEndOfLifeMilestone, "EoSWM%"), "EoSWM", currentEndOfLifeMilestone) | table deviceId, physicalAssetId, productId, deviceName, hardwareEndOfLifeId, productFamily, currentEndOfLifeMilestone

`cisco_oi_index("$cpyKey$")` sourcetype::cisco:bcs:hardwareendoflife | search physicalAssetType="$typeSelector$" | fields deviceId, productId, physicalAssetId, currentEndOfLifeMilestone, hardwareEndOfLifeId | dedup physicalAssetId | $singleLineGroupSelector$ | eval currentEndOfLifeMilestone = if(like(currentEndOfLifeMilestone, "EoRFA%"), "EoRFA", currentEndOfLifeMilestone) | eval currentEndOfLifeMilestone = if(like(currentEndOfLifeMilestone, "EoSWM%"), "EoSWM", currentEndOfLifeMilestone) | table deviceId, productId, physicalAssetId, currentEndOfLifeMilestone, hardwareEndOfLifeId

| loadjob $ASSET_EOL_COMBINED$ | stats count as Devices by currentEndOfLifeMilestone | rex mode=sed field=currentEndOfLifeMilestone "s/LDoS/Last Date of Support/" | rex mode=sed field=currentEndOfLifeMilestone "s/EoSWM/End of Software Maintenance/" | rex mode=sed field=currentEndOfLifeMilestone "s/EoSale/End of Sale/" | rex mode=sed field=currentEndOfLifeMilestone "s/EoRFA/End of Routine Failure Analysis/" | rex mode=sed field=currentEndOfLifeMilestone "s/EoSCR/End of Service Contract Renewal/" | rex mode=sed field=currentEndOfLifeMilestone "s/EoVSS/End of Vulnerability\/Security Support/"

| loadjob $ASSET_EOL_COMBINED$ | stats count as Devices by currentEndOfLifeMilestone | rex mode=sed field=currentEndOfLifeMilestone "s/LDoS/Last Date of Support/" | rex mode=sed field=currentEndOfLifeMilestone "s/EoSWM/End of Software Maintenance/" | rex mode=sed field=currentEndOfLifeMilestone "s/EoSale/End of Sale/" | rex mode=sed field=currentEndOfLifeMilestone "s/EoRFA/End of Routine Failure Analysis/" | rex mode=sed field=currentEndOfLifeMilestone "s/EoSCR/End of Service Contract Renewal/" | rex mode=sed field=currentEndOfLifeMilestone "s/EoVSS/End of Vulnerability\/Security Support/" | sort -Devices

| loadjob $ASSET_EOL_COMBINED$ | stats count as Components by currentEndOfLifeMilestone | eval HwMilestonePerc = round(100 * Components / $kvDevices$) | fields currentEndOfLifeMilestone, HwMilestonePerc | eval hiddenOrder = case(currentEndOfLifeMilestone="Not Announced", 1, currentEndOfLifeMilestone="Announced", 2, currentEndOfLifeMilestone="EoSale", 3, currentEndOfLifeMilestone="EoSWM", 4, currentEndOfLifeMilestone="EoRFA", 5, currentEndOfLifeMilestone="EoVSS", 6, currentEndOfLifeMilestone="EoSCR", 7, currentEndOfLifeMilestone="LDoS", 8) | fields currentEndOfLifeMilestone, HwMilestonePerc, hiddenOrder | sort hiddenOrder | table currentEndOfLifeMilestone, HwMilestonePerc

| loadjob $EOL_MILESTONES$ | search currentEndOfLifeMilestone="LDoS" | lookup `cisco_oi_asset_lookup($cpyKey$)` deviceId OUTPUT productFamily | stats count as Devices by productFamily | sort -Devices | head 10
| loadjob $EOL_MILESTONES$ | search currentEndOfLifeMilestone="LDoS" | stats count as Devices by productId | sort -Devices | head 10
| makeresults | eval Group = if("$groupIdSelected$"="*", "All Groups", "$groupIdSelected$") | table Group
| stats count as Initialize | eval subTitle="Total Components" | table subTitle

`cisco_oi_index("$cpyKey$")` sourcetype::cisco:bcs:asset physicalAssetType="$typeSelector$" | stats values(physicalAssetType) as physicalAssetType by physicalAssetId deviceId | $singleLineGroupSelector$ | stats dc(physicalAssetId) as Devices
